translations.en: Every morning I walk to work.
translations.fr: Chaque matin, je vais au travail à pied.
translations.de: Jeden Morgen gehe ich zu Fuß zur Arbeit.
translations.it: Ogni mattina vado al lavoro a piedi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我每天早上步行去上班。
translations.ru: Каждое утро я иду на работу пешком.
translations.pt: Todas as manhãs, eu vou a pé para o trabalho.
translations.he: כל בוקר אני הולך לעבודה ברגל.
translations.vi: Mỗi sáng tôi đi bộ đến chỗ làm.
translations.nl: Elke ochtend loop ik naar mijn werk.
translations.uk: Щоранку я йду на роботу пішки.
translations.hi: मैं हर सुबह पैदल काम पर जाता हूँ।
translations.pl: Każdego ranka idę do pracy pieszo.
translations.el: Κάθε πρωί πηγαίνω στη δουλειά με τα πόδια.
translations.nb: Hver morgen går jeg til jobb.
translations.id: Setiap pagi saya berjalan kaki ke kantor.
translations.sv: Varje morgon går jag till jobbet.
translations.ro: În fiecare dimineață merg pe jos la serviciu.
translations.cs: Každé ráno chodím do práce pěšky.
translations.da: Hver morgen går jeg på arbejde.
translations.ja: 私は毎朝歩いて仕事に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Determiner quantifier modifying the noun phrase 'mañana'.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition 'a' in the time expression 'al trabajo'?
First-person singular present indicative form of the verb 'caminar'.
Contraction of the preposition 'a' and the masculine singular article 'el'.
Common noun functioning as the object of the preposition 'a'.

translations.en: I wash the car every Sunday.
translations.fr: Je lave la voiture tous les dimanches.
translations.de: Ich wasche das Auto jeden Sonntag.
translations.pt: Eu lavo o carro todos os domingos.
translations.he: אני שוטף את המכונית כל יום ראשון.
translations.vi: Tôi rửa xe vào mỗi Chủ nhật.
translations.nl: Ik was de auto elke zondag.
translations.hi: मैं हर रविवार कार धोता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya mencuci mobil setiap hari Minggu.
translations.ja: 私は毎週日曜日に車を洗います。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular present indicative form of the verb 'lavar'.
Definite article modifying the noun 'coche'.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'Lavo'.
Determiner quantifier modifying the noun 'domingo'.
Common noun used as a temporal noun in the adverbial phrase 'cada domingo'.

sentences.target: Ella llama a su madre cada noche.
sentences.reading: /ˈeʝa ˈʝama a su ˈmaðɾe ˈkaða ˈnotʃe/

translations.es: Ella llama a su madre cada noche.
translations.ipa: /ˈeʝa ˈʝama a su ˈmaðɾe ˈkaða ˈnotʃe/
translations.en: She calls her mother every night.
translations.fr: Elle appelle sa mère chaque soir.
translations.de: Sie ruft ihre Mutter jeden Abend an.
translations.zh-Hans: 她每晚给她妈妈打电话。
translations.yue: 佢每晚打電話畀佢媽媽。
translations.ru: Она звонит своей маме каждый вечер.
translations.pt: Ela liga para a mãe todas as noites.
translations.he: היא מתקשרת לאמא שלה כל לילה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy gọi cho mẹ mỗi đêm.
translations.nl: Ze belt elke avond haar moeder.
translations.hi: वह हर रात अपनी माँ को फोन करती है।
translations.pl: Ona dzwoni do swojej mamy każdego wieczoru.
translations.el: Κάθε βράδυ τηλεφωνεί στη μητέρα της.
translations.nb: Hun ringer moren sin hver kveld.
translations.sv: Hon ringer sin mamma varje kväll.
translations.ro: Ea își sună mama în fiecare seară.
translations.da: Hun ringer til sin mor hver aften.
translations.ja: 彼女は毎晩母親に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun serving as the subject.
Third-person singular present indicative form of the verb 'llamar'.
Preposition introducing the indirect object phrase 'su madre'.
Possessive determiner modifying the noun 'madre'.
Common noun functioning as the object of the preposition 'a'.
Determiner quantifier modifying the noun 'noche'.
Common noun used as a temporal noun in the adverbial phrase 'cada noche'.

sentences.target: Comemos pizza cada viernes con amigos.

translations.es: Comemos pizza cada viernes con amigos.
translations.en: We eat pizza every Friday with friends.
translations.fr: Nous mangeons de la pizza chaque vendredi avec des amis.
translations.de: Wir essen jeden Freitag Pizza mit Freunden.
translations.it: Mangiamo la pizza ogni venerdì con gli amici.
translations.ko: 우리는 매주 금요일 친구들과 피자를 먹는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们每周五和朋友一起吃披萨。
translations.yue: 我哋逢星期五同朋友食薄餅。
translations.ru: Мы едим пиццу каждую пятницу с друзьями.
translations.pt: Nós comemos pizza toda sexta-feira com amigos.
translations.he: אנחנו אוכלים פיצה בכל יום שישי עם חברים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ăn pizza vào mỗi thứ Sáu với bạn bè.
translations.ar: نأكل البيتزا كل يوم جمعة مع الأصدقاء.
translations.nl: We eten elke vrijdag pizza met vrienden.
translations.uk: Ми їмо піцу щоп’ятниці з друзями.
translations.hu: Minden pénteken pizzát eszünk a barátokkal.
translations.hi: हम हर शुक्रवार दोस्तों के साथ पिज़्ज़ा खाते हैं।
translations.pl: Jemy pizzę w każdy piątek z przyjaciółmi.
translations.el: Τρώμε πίτσα κάθε Παρασκευή με φίλους.
translations.nb: Vi spiser pizza hver fredag med venner.
translations.id: Kami makan pizza setiap hari Jumat bersama teman-teman.
translations.sv: Vi äter pizza varje fredag med vänner.
translations.ro: Mâncăm pizza în fiecare vineri cu prietenii.
translations.cs: Každý pátek jíme s přáteli pizzu.
translations.da: Vi spiser pizza hver fredag med venner.
translations.fi: Syömme pizzaa joka perjantai ystävien kanssa.
translations.ja: 私たちは毎週金曜日に友達とピザを食べます。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural present indicative form of the verb 'comer'.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'Comemos'.
Determiner quantifier modifying the noun 'viernes'.
Common noun used as a temporal noun in the adverbial phrase 'cada viernes'.
